session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→title: CMUX Integration 3→read_when: 4→ - "working with cmux workspace management" 5→ - "understanding erk's cmux integration points" 6→tripwires: [] 7→--- 8→ 9→# CMUX Integration 10→ 11→Erk integrates with [cmux](https://github.com/dagster-io/cmux), a terminal multiplexer, for workspace management. 12→ 13→## Workspace Rename Command 14→ 15→`/local:cmux-workspace-rename` is a slash command that renames the current cmux workspace to match the current git branch name. It runs two sequential commands: 16→ 17→1. `git branch --show-current` — get the current branch name 18→2. `cmux rename-workspace "<branch>"` — rename the workspace 19→ 20→**Source:** `.claude/commands/local/cmux-workspace-rename.md` 21→ 22→## TUI Integration 23→ 24→The TUI provides a `cmux_sync` command (launch key `m`) that synchronizes the cmux workspace name with the current branch. This serves a similar purpose but is integrated into the TUI workflow rather than being a standalone CLI command. 25→ 26→### When to Use Each 27→ 28→| Tool | Context | Use When | 29→| ------------------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------- | 30→| `/local:cmux-workspace-rename` | Claude Code CLI | Standalone rename during a Claude session |
... [7 lines omitted] ...

1→<!-- AUTO-GENERATED FILE - DO NOT EDIT DIRECTLY --> 2→<!-- 3→ Regenerate: erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs 4→ CI check: erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs --check (included in make fast-ci) 5→ 6→ Source of truth: Live Click command tree in src/erk/cli/commands/exec/group.py 7→ Generator code: packages/erk-dev/src/erk_dev/exec_reference/generate.py 8→ Generator docs: docs/learned/cli/auto-generated-reference-docs.md 9→ 10→ Regenerate after: adding/modifying/removing exec commands or changing help text 11→--> 12→ 13→# erk exec Commands Reference 14→ 15→Quick reference for all `erk exec` subcommands. 16→ 17→## Summary 18→ 19→| Command | Description | 20→| --------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- | 21→| `add-plan-label` | Add a label to a plan via the appropriate backend. | 22→| `add-plan-labels` | Batch add labels to multiple plans from JSON stdin. | 23→| `add-pr-labels` | Add labels to a PR with automatic retry on transient failures. | 24→| `add-remote-execution-note` | Add remote execution tracking note to PR body. | 25→| `capture-session-info` | Capture Claude Code session info for CI workflows. | 26→| `ci-fetch-summaries` | Fetch CI failure summaries for a PR. | 27→| `ci-generate-summaries` | Generate CI failure summaries using Haiku. | 28→| `ci-update-pr-body` | Update PR body with AI-generated summary and footer. | 29→| `ci-verify-autofix` | Run full CI verification after autofix push. | 30→| `cleanup-impl-context` | Clean up .erk/impl-context/ staging directory. |
... [1371 lines omitted] ...
144→Add labels to a PR with automatic retry on transient failures. 188→Fetch CI failure summaries for a PR. 200→Generate CI failure summaries using Haiku. 408→| `--job-status` | CHOICE | Yes | Sentinel.UNSET | Job status (success or failure) |

### `erk exec cmux-sync-workspace`
Creates a cmux workspace that checks out a PR and sync...[truncated 15 chars]...x-sync-workspace --pr 8152 erk exec cmux-sync-workspace --pr 8152 --branch "my-branch" ```

session.tool_result: The file /home/runner/work/erk/erk/.claude/skills/cmux/SKILL.md has been updated successfully.

tool_use.name: Edit
tool_use.param: - **cmux sync** (action) -- Creates a cmux workspace for the selected plan's PR - **copy cmux sync** (copy) -- Copies the cmux sync command to clipboard
- **cmux checkout** (action) -- Creates a cmux workspace for the selected plan's PR - **copy cmux checkout** (copy) -- Copies the cmux checkout command to clipboard

session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→title: TUI Command Registration 3→read_when: 4→ - "adding a new TUI command to the registry" 5→ - "understanding the 3-place coordination pattern for TUI commands" 6→ - "working with TUI command categories or display formatters" 7→tripwires: 8→ - action: "adding a new TUI command without updating all 3 places" 9→ warning: "TUI commands require 3-place coordination: registry definition, display formatter, and action inventory. See tui-command-registration.md." 10→ - action: "adding a CLI flag that affects behavior without checking TUI command palette" 11→ warning: "TUI command palette generates shell commands via src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py. When adding CLI flags that change behavior, check if TUI-generated commands need the flag too." 12→--- 13→ 14→# TUI Command Registration 15→ 16→Adding a TUI command requires coordinating three places in the codebase. 17→ 18→## 3-Place Coordination Pattern 19→ 20→When adding a command, update all three: 21→ 22→1. **Display formatter**: A `_display_*()` function that generates the display name 23→2. **CommandDefinition**: Entry in `get_all_commands()` with id, name, category, availability, and display getter 24→3. **Action inventory**: Command appears in the correct category 25→ 26→All definitions are in `src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py`. 27→ 28→## Single Source of Truth: `launch_key` Field 29→ 30→<!-- Source: src/erk/tui/commands/types.py:60 -->
... [75 lines omitted] ...
The file /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/tui-command-registration.md has been updated successfully.

session.tool_result:
The fast CI suite executed but failed due to a documentation issue. Here's the summary:
## Test Results Summary
**Status:** FAILED - Exit Code 2
### Breakdown by Component:
1. **Lint** - PASSED: All checks passed 2. **Format Check** - PASSED: 1613 files already formatted 3. **Prettier Check** - WARNING: Code style issues found in 2 files - `/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` 4. **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md Pairing** - PASSED: All 19 files properly paired 5. **Markdown Check** - PASSED 6. **Exec Reference Check** - FAILED: `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is out of date - Error message: "Run 'erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs' to regenerate it." 7. **Type Check (ty)** - PASSED: All checks passed 8. **Unit Tests (erk)** - PASSED: 5630 tests passed in 22.42s 9. **Unit Tests (erk-dev)** - PASSED: 136 tests passed in 4.41s 10. **Unit Tests (erk-statusline)** - PASSED: 115 tests passed in 0.85s 11. **Unit Tests (erk-mcp)** - PASSED: 24 tests passed (output truncated)
### Critical Issues:
1. **Exec Reference Documentation Out of Date**: The `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` file needs to be regenerated using `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` 2. **Prettier Formatting Issues**: Two markdown files need formatting in the docs/learned directory
All unit tests passed successfully (5,800+ tests), but the CI suite failed on the documentation generation check. agentId: ac347c6 (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed)

session.tool_result:
The fast CI suite has mostly passed, but there are **formatting issues** with 2 files that need to be addressed:
## Summary
**Exit Code:** 2 (failure)
**Results:** - Lint: PASSED - Format Check: PASSED (1613 files already formatted) - Prettier Check: **FAILED** - Code style issues found in 2 files - Markdown Check: OK - Exec Reference Check: OK - Type Check (ty): PASSED - Unit Tests (erk): PASSED (5630 tests) - Unit Tests (erk-dev): PASSED (136 tests) - Unit Tests (erk-statusline): PASSED (115 tests) - Unit Tests (erk-mcp): Started (22+ tests)
## Issues Found
**Prettier formatting issues in 2 files:** 1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
These files require formatting with Prettier to pass the CI suite. The test suite itself is passing (5630 + 136 + 115 tests = 5881 total tests passed), but the formatting violations are blocking the overall CI result. agentId: a7c051a (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed)
